inputs.srepr: Equality(Add(Mul(Symbol('W_e', positive=True, real=True), Add(Function('f')(Symbol('r', positive=True, real=True)), Mul(Integer(-1), Function('f_ext')(Symbol('r', positive=True, real=True))))), Mul(Symbol('W_i', positive=True, real=True), Add(Function('f')(Symbol('r', positive=True, real=True)), Mul(Integer(-1), Function('f_int')(Symbol('r', positive=True, real=True))))), Mul(Integer(-1), Symbol('lambda_1', positive=True, real=True), Derivative(Function('f')(Symbol('r', positive=True, real=True)), Tuple(Symbol('r', positive=True, real=True), Integer(2)))), Mul(Symbol('lambda_2', positive=True, real=True), Derivative(Function('f')(Symbol('r', positive=True, real=True)), Tuple(Symbol('r', positive=True, real=True), Integer(4))))), Integer(0))
inputs.latex: W_{e} \left(f{\left(r \right)} - f_{ext}{\left(r \right)}\right) + W_{i} \left(f{\left(r \right)} - f_{int}{\left(r \right)}\right) - \lambda_{1} \frac{d^{2}}{d r^{2}} f{\left(r \right)} + \lambda_{2} \frac{d^{4}}{d r^{4}} f{\left(r \right)} = 0

method: schematic EL for constant W_i, W_e: lam2*f'''' - lam1*f'' + (W_i+W_e)*f = W_i*f_int + W_e*f_ext
scope: constant weights only; radial weight dependence not handled
